title: The Foxy Way and the Twirling Ghost
summary: Peacock the Wizard attempts to recruit Izzy for a magical quest to find hat parts for Hattie the Mouse. However, Izzy is far too busy playing a unique and complex game at Hattie's Workshop of Hats with her friends. Eschewing the adventure, the Wizard joins the group to learn the rules of a game involving foxy ghosts, penguin steps, and elusive directions. Under the guidance of a singing Robot Mommy, the friends learn that while some find it hard to be a fox, everyone can find their own unique way to share—even if it's just twirling.

highlightQuote.text: First you have to pull the ear, and then you have to turn over, and then you have to walk. Do you know that? And there's a penguin step, too.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Stars! You want to tell a story about?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Wizard stars!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah. What do you want to tell a story about?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hmm. How about?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Peacock the Wizard's castle one!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You want to work on the Wizard's castle one? Okay. I'm going to sit right here. Izzy the Kiddo's Wizard!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, Peacock...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh no! No the rest of it!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The rest of it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yep. No, with your big bad, the Christopher Robin and Tigger.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hmm. Once upon a time, Izzy the Kiddo's phone rang and she picked it up and she said, 'Hello, who is it?' And it was...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Everyone at the Wizard's castle with Peacock the Wizard!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Peacock the Wizard said, 'Hello Izzy, I have a quest for you to go on. I need you to go with a group of your friends in a car and drive a long way to a place where you can get special magical pieces to make hats with for Hattie the Mouse. Special glowing sparkling hat parts. Do you accept this quest, Izzy?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm not sure about that. Right now I'm playing with my friends Hattie and Mistress. I'm playing a game with them.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what game are you playing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm playing 'Foxy Foxy Foxy Foxy Is My Foxy Foxy Foxy Foxy Is My Foxy' and then a ghost comes and says, 'That's my toy!' That's the game they're playing with Mistress now and Hattie Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I see. And then what happens?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They decide to share.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, sharing is excellent, Izzy the Kiddo. What are you sharing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A game piece. They have to get back up onto the wall with a friend. His name is Pooh, Pooh Bear... Yep. Now that's, I'm playing the game with them. Mistress Mouse and Hattie. So, I'm not going to go on that quest for now. I'm still playing the game.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, that's quite alright. We can save...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And it has directions. Maybe you could do it with your friends if you want. With your friends.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What are the directions?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, my game has the directions.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh I see. Can you tell me the directions for the game?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: First you have to pull the ear, and then you have to turn over, and then you have to walk. Do you know that? And there's a penguin step, too. And you have to add the penguin to my game.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A penguin? I'm not sure I quite understood the directions. Can we start at the beginning again? What's step one?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Nope. I'm playing it right now. Playing the game with my Hattie the Mouse and Mistress Mouse. So you can bring all of your friends with you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And you can do it with your friends, okay?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Okay, thank you,' says Peacock the Wizard. 'I'll come right over and play with you. Goodbye.' And so, Peacock the Wizard hung up the phone and then he walked down out of his tower and out of his castle and down the road along the hill and through the forest and all the way to... well whose house were you at? Where are you playing your game, Izzy the Kiddo?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: At Hattie's Workshop of Hats.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ah, at Hattie's Workshop. And so, Peacock the Wizard arrived at the door to Hattie's Workshop of Hats and knocked gently on the door. [Knocking sounds] 'Could I play your game that you're playing?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And it also has directions. 'Could I play the game with you, Hattie and Mistress?'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Peacock the Wizard asked politely, 'Could I play the game with you?' And what did they say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No no, I said that. 'Could I play with you, Hattie and Mistress? Could I play with you, Hattie and Mistress?' And they said, 'Oh yes, Izzy the Kiddo, of course you can play.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And the game has directions. 'Let's play it together! Let's play the game together!'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Peacock the Wizard said, 'Oh yes, let's play the game together!'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yep, and with Hattie and Mistress.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And with Hattie and Mistress, yes. Now, the game begins by everyone standing up and holding hands.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No no no! No!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: No? How do we begin?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You have to play the game... No, the dice game.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yes, of course, the dice game. Do we roll the dice?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No! You do not roll the dice!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, how do we play?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: First, the foxy foxy ghost.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Foxy foxy ghost?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And they said it. And the other things are stars, and then they share. Yeah, then they decide to share and it also has directions. And then her mommy robot comes and says, 'You can do it with your friends if you want to. Yub yub yub yub, the foxy way and the ghost way, too. Nah nah nah nah nah nah nah.' That's what Robot Mommy said.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I see. Hello Robot Mommy.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Robot... and then they said, 'We're trying to share, you can do it the ghost way and the foxy way.' And then the ghost said, 'I was trying to do it the foxy way, but I could not do it like foxy. So you have to do it your own way. Maybe like twirling.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, by twirling. Okay, we're almost out of time for our story, and now we have to bring it to an end. And so they finished the directions and that's how they played their amazing game. Izzy the Kiddo and Hattie the Mouse and Mistress Mouse and Peacock the Wizard all had had a very fun time playing their game. But then they all realized that it was getting late and it was time to go home and go to sleep. And so each of the creatures went back to their own homes and got in their beds and got all tucked in to sleep. Goodnight everyone. The end.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, now we're done with stars and stories.

characters.name: Peacock the Wizard
characters.description: Once a deep-ocean companion to Seeker, this vibrant bird wizard now serves as the charismatic host of the magical castle’s grand show. From a cozy nest atop a soaring tower, they orchestrate wonder through balloon school arts—transmuting rubber into succulent strawberries—while proudly sporting a magnificent hat gifted by Hattie and Izzy. A playful visionary of dreamer magic and a tireless seeker of rare diamond-shaped potions, they use their stage to beckon heroes into a world of soaring imagination, often dispatching them on whimsical quests to recover enchanted new hats for their growing collection.

characters.name: Izzy the Kiddo
characters.description: Once a quiet dreamer sketching from a recovery bed, this brave explorer now leads her companions through Hattie’s workshop and the lightless abyss, guided by a beacon of special light. Clad in a rugged driving suit alongside Bluey and Fincat’s Mouse, she wields heavy hammers and a magic wand with logistical precision inherited from her Nana. From trading plastic bricks for rare mushrooms to orchestrating neighborhood cleanups, she balances specialized gear with a playful spirit. Choosing the spark of a game over the gravity of a traditional quest, she ensures her radiant creativity and guiding light remain her most powerful tools for navigating the unknown.

characters.name: Hattie the Mouse
characters.description: A nimble, friendly mouse of Possible Street and loyal friend to Izzy and Seeker, this brave artisan is the wife of Dimitar and mistress of the Workshop of Hats—a weathered hollow tree sanctuary on Cornell Street scented with cedar, ink, and peanut butter toast. Clad in her signature red cloak and pointy hat, she is a resourceful hatmaker whose spirit was forged against massive diggers and the rain-slicked Floofer Cloud. Within her paint-stained home, she carefully curates her husband’s library alongside her own hand-painted volumes while confronting a baffling supply mystery; the discovery of curious clover stickers signals a gathering shadow of intrigue she is determined to unravel.

characters.name: Mistress Mouse
characters.description: A polite three-year-old mouse and resourceful shopkeeper, this community cornerstone balances a bold artistic spirit with sharp mechanical grit. Whether crafting intricate Lego creations in her sunroom or piloting her signature pink tow truck to solve puzzles and assist neighbors, she is a master of the road and a multi-talented creator. From famously adorning cars with blue stripes to dominating the race track, her inventive soul is always on the move. Usually seen in a mushroom-adorned cardboard hat with an orange sparkle purse, this resourceful driver remains an essential, evocative fixture of every neighborhood adventure.

characters.name: Pooh Bear
characters.description: A honey-loving Super Sleuth whose likeness is woven into the game upon the wall, renowned for his singular insight that the group’s direst problems are often rooted in nothing more than a collective, gnawing hunger.

characters.name: Robot Mommy
characters.description: A mechanical parent figure who sings instructions about how to share.

characters.name: The Ghost
characters.description: A character in the game who claims toys and learns that everyone has their own way to share.

characters.name: The Penguin
characters.description: A character or entity added to the game during the 'penguin step'.

characters.name: Christopher Robin
characters.description: The master of the house at the final destination is a gentle boy and companion to Tigger, recently returned from a fishing trip to serve as the catalyst for the pilgrimage to the Wizard’s castle. Navigating the halls in a small car, he wanders the gallery of existence with a quiet, unsettling grace, pausing as a helpful friend to assist in inflating balloons. A reverent guest in his own domain, he visits Piglet—the foundational architect of a looming "big bad"—before setting the gears of the quest in motion and retiring home for a nap.

characters.name: Tigger
characters.description: A friendly and boisterous Super Sleuth from the Hundred Acre Wood, this bouncing adventurer zips into action on a scooter, bringing a whirlwind of enthusiasm to help his friends and aid the local mice.

places.name: The Wizard's Castle
places.description: Crowned upon a hill, the gray stone castle is distinguished by its tall turrets and a soaring tower, the lofty home where Peacock the Wizard resides behind a beautiful wooden door.

places.name: Hattie's Workshop of Hats
places.description: The destination where the friends gather to play their elaborate games.

places.name: The Forest
places.description: Cloaking the surface of the green planet in a vast mantle of dense greenery, this whispering woodland serves as the lush setting of the 'Forest Friends' chronicle. It is a realm where creatures play eternal hide-and-seek between Hattie’s cozy clinic and the ancestral cradle of Finn’s companions. Along magical trails where Hattie and the Pakruder Worm harvest hat-making ingredients, winding paths veil secret gopher tunnels and hidden mole cottages, forming the essential route toward the wizard's castle. While its sun-drenched threshold remains a sanctuary for the Rainbow Giraffe and Mama Bird, the deeper, darker thickets harbor a somber mystery; it was within these sprawling, uncharted depths—the same eerie expanse where the sick creature was first spotted and Mossy was discovered—that Mole recently vanished into the shadows.
